message:
test(cli): Improve coverage for guard.ts and diary.ts

- Add comprehensive tests for installGitHook function in guard.ts
- Add tests for guard --git flag handling and JSON output modes
- Add tests for diary command edge cases (empty path, directory path)
- Add tests for diary JSON error mode and human-readable output
- Add tests for validateSessionPath and handleDiaryOutput functions

Coverage improvements:
- guard.ts: 54% → 94%
- diary.ts: 57% → 93%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
